dialogue_text: Cannot the war be ended at once?
source_excerpt: "Cannot the war be ended at once?" spoke Sab Than. "It requires but the word of Than Kosis to bring peace. Say it, my father, say the word that will hasten my happiness, and end this unpopular strife."

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.
